name: Colcannon
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, simmer the cabbage covered in 2 cups of water and olive oil for 10 minutes (longer if desired). Drain and chop fine; set aside.
2. In a small pot, bring potatoes and water to a boil, then simmer until tender. Drain and puree.
3. In another small pot, simmer leeks in milk for 10 minutes, then keep warm.
4. Add the puréed potatoes, leeks with milk, and cooked cabbage to the large pot. Beat until fluffy.
5. Season with ground mace, salt, and pepper.
6. Mound the mixture on a serving platter/dish and top with melted butter.
7. Garnish with parsley if desired.
Note: Butter must be used, not shortening (oleo).
